name: Catbotica: Luck-Module Recalibration Proof — Soulbound Zodiac Certificates
description: Non-transferable proof-of-recalibration certificates for the Catbotica Luck-Module Recalibration Protocol (LMRP). Each Soulbound Token permanently records that a unit completed its zodiac recalibration for a given year. These tokens cannot be traded — they are identity and reputation artifacts bound to the wallet that earned them.
